changelog:
Viumo 1.0.0 (Official Release)

This version marks the official launch of Viumo, introducing a more complete and refined streaming experience.

Updates:
- Enhanced video player with portrait, landscape, and auto orientation support
- Improved and consistent user interface across the app
- Smart movie recommendations after search and viewing
- Download and watch offline functionality
- Upgraded search layout and experience
- General performance improvements and bug fixes

Note:
Viumo is still evolving. Some features are being refined, and more powerful updates are coming soon.

This release sets the foundation for the future of Viumo.
